title: eriogonum lonchophyllum
intro: Eriogonum lonchophyllum, also known as the Utah buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum lonchophyllum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Eriogonum lonchophyllum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its leaves and stems can be used in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being.
